<!--
Title your PR to match the branch category, e.g. "feat: add status filter tabs".
See CONTRIBUTING.md for the branching convention.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check the one that matches your branch prefix. -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — restructuring, no behavior change
- [ ] `test` — adding or fixing tests
- [ ] `chore` — deps, tooling, config, housekeeping
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD or workflow changes

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this? -->

- [ ] `flutter test` passes
- [ ] Verified the change manually (device / emulator / web demo mode)
